Always strives to look her best, as if anything less is a direct insult to her personality. ANNIKA T wo weeks have passed since the day my life was flipped upside down. Since the day I danced with Creighton in the rain and then he kissed me. Partly because I’m becoming accustomed to his ministrations. Partly because he’s the one behind the pain. Not anyone else—Creighton. Though I stopped idolizing him a long time ago. Not only is he an imperfect human, but I also dislike him sometimes.
